title: Zindoo Window Film Privacy Self Adhesive Stain Glass Film Window Cling No-Glue Static Decorative Window Covering Frosted Window Film 44.5 x 200CM
features: 【Decorate Your Home】:This flower type window film can bring you different felling in different scenes. It can be applied for any smooth glass.
【Static Cling Design】:The window film self adhesive,can be removed easily without any traces left. So, it can be reused even after several years if not be damaged or smudged.
【Quick and Easy to Use】Window decoration, applied in minutes, will looks great for years. This window film can be easily trimmed to required size with scissors or utility knife.

【Privacy Level】: Provides 90% Privacy, this privacy window film allows natural light in and won't make your room dark at all, it's also a clean, modern alternative instead of curtains or blinds.(not recommend for bathroom use)
【NOTE】: Peel the backing film off before installation and full wet your window and window film. (detail instructions, please refer to the Product Description below).
description: Product Description Zindoo 3D Window Film Privacy Home Decoration Our tulip window privacy film provides Privacy Protection and also adds Elegance & Beauty to your home. Beautiful 3D flowers pattern, stylish and attractive, Never Out of Style. Our frosted window film blocks out 84% of UVA rays and 99% of UVB rays. And also allow natural lights in. Protecting your skin and furniture from damaging of the sun. Previous page Anti UV & Enjoy Natural Light This window film can block strong light, anti glare, and create a rainbow effect, allowing you enjoy life in the soft sunlight. Enjoy DIY for Any Smooth Glass Surface Our self adhesive window film is very easy to cut, enjoy a fun DIY with your family. Best Choices for Decoration Perfect for kitchen, living room, bedroom, school, office, glass table, glass cabinet, etc. Next page Window Film Installation Steps Clean the window or glass surface thoroughly. Measure the surface and cut the film. Spray the surface with enough soapy water. Peel off the transparent backing film. Install the film onto the window, squeegee away excess water and air bubbles, trim off the margins. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  0:24 Loaded : 25.02% 0:00 Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 0:24   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions Captions off , selected English (Automated) Audio Track default , selected Fullscreen This is a modal window. video Merchant video The privacy films for glass windows will create a Rainbow Effect when the sunlight shines through, different lights will appear different colors. The window film is transparent and different from the pictures displayed. The tulip privacy window film is transparent itself with no color, but it will create a colorful effect when sunlight hits it. How to avoid the film peeling off? Importantly make sure the remove the protective transparent backing film, keep the glass clean, spray enough water and use the squeegee to remove excess water and air bubbles. How to remove the protective transparent backing film? There is a head start on peeling the backing away by providing a little tab, if you cut the roll to your shape, you can create your own little tab with some adhesive tape. Why does the corner curl up? It make the installation harder. Because of the elasticity of this film. Soaked in water or blown soft with a hair dryer to reduce the curling force. Can the privacy glass film be used in the bathroom? The window film privacy level is not 100%, we don't recommend to use it in the bathroom, but it can be used in any smooth glass to provide privacy protection and perfect home decoration.
